'''Aama''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] with [[Alpha Blue]], a group within the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]]. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], Aama was one of [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson's]] senior facilitators who informed Drayson the location of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Drayson passed the information to [[Formayj]], who then gave it to [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] in order to save [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] life.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
